Association between Viral Infections and ESCC
Development: According to Bayesian logistic regression
analysis, a significant inverse association between HPV
infection and odds of ESCC was observed (OR, 0.36; 95 %
CI: 0.17-0.77). Although EBV infection was related to
higher risk of ESCC, it did not get the significant level (OR,
